compilation.bench_example_load.SlowExamp.code:
class SlowExampleAnymalFeatherstone:
    @skip_benchmark_if(wp.get_cuda_device_count() == 0)
    def time_load(self):
        """Time the amount of time it takes to load and run one frame of the example."""
    
        command = [
            sys.executable,
            "-m",
            "newton.examples.example_anymal_c_walk",
            "--stage-path",
            "None",
            "--num-frames",
            "1",
            "--headless",
        ]
    
        # Run the script as a subprocess
        result = subprocess.run(command, capture_output=True, text=True, check=True)
    
        print(f"Output:\n{result.stdout}\n{result.stderr}")

    def setup(self):
        wp.build.clear_lto_cache()
        wp.build.clear_kernel_cache()
compilation.bench_example_load.SlowExamp.name: compilation.bench_example_load.SlowExampleAnymalFeatherstone.time_load

setup.bench_model.FastInitializeModel.pe.code:
class FastInitializeModel:
    def peakmem_initialize_model_cpu(self, robot, num_envs):
        gc.collect()
    
        with wp.ScopedDevice("cpu"):
            builder = Example.create_model_builder(robot, num_envs, randomize=True, seed=123)
    
            # finalize model
            model = builder.finalize()
    
        del model

    def setup_cache(self):
        # Load a small model to cache the kernels
        builder = Example.create_model_builder("cartpole", 1, randomize=False, seed=123)
        model = builder.finalize(device="cpu")
        del model
setup.bench_model.FastInitializeModel.pe.name: setup.bench_model.FastInitializeModel.peakmem_initialize_model_cpu
